channel.title: Comments on: Terrapin: Indiana Krunkles, Ep. 162
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Morse
item.dc:creator: Morse
item.description:
Bring back David Little! :-)
I agree with Paul & Pink about what David adds to the podcast (guess he just needs to move to Ft Worth?)
The episode Pink mentioned (where David wore the mic cover) is probably my all time favorite and it was also for a great beer -- Duck Rabbit Wee Heavy Scotch Ale!
item.content:encoded:
Bring back David Little! 🙂

I agree with Paul & Pink about what David adds to the podcast (guess he just needs to move to Ft Worth?)

The episode Pink mentioned (where David wore the mic cover) is probably my all time favorite and it was also for a great beer — Duck Rabbit Wee Heavy Scotch Ale!
